checkedClaims.claimText: Figure 2 shows the local neighborhood as an engineering object: nearby theory families are connected by typed rewrite-oriented transformations, and that structured treatment of transformations aligns well with the categorical view of rewriting systems [DUVAL-2011].
checkedClaims.normalizedClaim: figure 2 shows the local neighborhood as an engineering object nearby theory families are connected by typed rewrite-oriented transformations and that structured treatment of transformations aligns well with the categorical view of rewriting systems duval-2011
checkedClaims.note: Supports claims about categorical rewriting and typed transformation structure.

checkedClaims.claimText: Likewise, future work on richer transformation semantics should make refinement, coarsening, and refactorization more explicitly rewrite-oriented, categorically structured, and formally typed, especially if the repository grows beyond the current handcrafted domain bundles [DUVAL-2011].
checkedClaims.normalizedClaim: likewise future work on richer transformation semantics should make refinement coarsening and refactorization more explicitly rewrite-oriented categorically structured and formally typed especially if the repository grows beyond the current handcrafted domain bundles duval-2011
checkedClaims.note: Supports claims about categorical rewriting and typed transformation structure.

checkedClaims.claimText: Categorical rewriting and explicit compatibility make those relations meaningful rather than decorative [DUVAL-2011].
checkedClaims.normalizedClaim: categorical rewriting and explicit compatibility make those relations meaningful rather than decorative duval-2011

checkedClaims.claimText: Categorical abstract rewriting contributes a precise language for typed local transformations and their compatibility [DUVAL-2011].
checkedClaims.normalizedClaim: categorical abstract rewriting contributes a precise language for typed local transformations and their compatibility duval-2011

checkedClaims.claimText: Categorical rewriting is treated as typed local transformation rather than as an unstructured state diff, which is why compatibility and composition become first-class concerns [DUVAL-2011].
checkedClaims.normalizedClaim: categorical rewriting is treated as typed local transformation rather than as an unstructured state diff which is why compatibility and composition become first-class concerns duval-2011

checkedClaims.claimText: It also contains the transformation family `Mi` and the observer-relative equivalence classes `Ei`, so categorical local rewriting and structural compatibility remain explicit [DUVAL-2011].
